oria_naturithm.name: Healthy Pancakes
oria_naturithm.caption:
Your kid doesn't know these are healthy. And that's the point.

3 eggs. Almond flour. Half a banana. A pinch of baking soda. That's it.

No wheat. No sugar. No seed oils. No ingredients you can't pronounce.

They'll crack a little when you flip them — that's the almond flour. No gluten holding them together. That's a feature, not a bug.

What your kid gets: protein, healthy fats, potassium, fiber. No blood sugar crash. No bloat. No "I'm hungry again" 20 minutes later.

What they think they're getting: pancakes.

Feed them what their body recognizes. Not what a factory designed.

Recipe:
— 3 eggs (your foundation)
— 2 tbsp almond flour
— ½ banana, mashed
— ¼ tsp baking soda
— Cook on medium. Flip gently. Serve with love.

Save this for tomorrow morning.

#healthypancakes #glutenfree #kidsbreakfast #cleanrecipe #realfood #nosugar #healthybreakfast #grainfree #oria #naturithm #feedthemwell #paleokids

oria_naturithm.name: Fermented Garlic Honey
oria_naturithm.caption:
Two ingredients. One month. Ancient medicine on your shelf.

Here's how to make fermented garlic honey — one of the most powerful natural remedies you can keep at home.

🧄 Crush (don't chop) fresh garlic cloves — this activates allicin, the compound that makes garlic a natural antibiotic.

🍯 Cover with raw honey only — not the processed kind. Raw honey has wild yeasts that make fermentation happen.

🔄 Seal the jar. Flip it daily. Wait one month.

What you get: a living, antimicrobial, immune-boosting tonic. One spoonful when you feel something coming on. Or daily as prevention.

No pharmacy sells this. Nature already made the medicine. Be patient enough to let it work.

Save this for when cold season hits.

#fermentedgarlic #garlicinhoney #naturalmedicine #immuneboost #homeremedy #fermentation #rawgarlicbenefits #rawhoney #guthealth #oria #naturithm #ancestralhealth

oria_naturithm.name: Running Science
oria_naturithm.caption:
You're running too fast. Or not running at all. Both are the same mistake.

Here's what nobody told you about running:

1. Zone 2 training (60-70% max HR) is where the magic happens
2. If you can't hold a conversation, slow down
3. Your body makes its own bliss molecule after 30 min
4. 2 million years of evolution designed you for this

Elite marathon runners train at easy pace 80% of the time. You should too.

Start with 15 minutes. Walk if you need to. Just move.

Lace up. Go slow. Trust the process.

Save this for your next run.

#running #zone2training #runnersofinstagram #beginnerrunner #runningmotivation #slowrunning #endurance #borntorun #oria #naturithm #movement #runningtips

oria_naturithm.name: DIY Natural Deodorant
oria_naturithm.caption:
Aluminum. Parabens. Phthalates. You put this on your skin every single day.

Or you could make your own.

Here's the recipe:
🫕 Melt: beeswax + coconut oil + shea butter
🥄 Mix in: arrowroot powder + pinch of baking soda
💧 Add: tea tree + lavender oil (nature's antibacterials)
🫙 Pour into jar. Let set 2 hours. Done.

6 months of deodorant for less than one stick costs.

It won't stop you from sweating. Good. Your body sweats to cool itself and flush toxins. Aluminum stops that. This doesn't.

Your skin absorbs what you put on it. Choose what nature made, not what a factory engineered.

#naturaldeodorant #diyskincare #cleanbeauty #nontoxicliving #homemadedeodorant #naturalbeauty #zerowaste #oria #naturithm #skincare #toxinfree

oria_naturithm.name: Understanding Addiction
oria_naturithm.caption:
Nobody chooses addiction. They choose relief.

It was never about the thing. It was about the feeling underneath.

The question isn't "why the addiction." It's "why the pain."

Willpower doesn't fix a wound. You can't discipline your way out of something your nervous system chose to survive.

The opposite of addiction isn't sobriety. It's connection.

You are not your coping mechanism. You are the person underneath it. And that person deserves gentleness.

If this resonates, send it to someone who needs to hear it today.

#addiction #mentalhealth #recovery #healing #gabormateé #connection #trauma #selfcompassion #oria #naturithm #innerwork #sobriety

naturithm7.name: Wayne Dyer — Perspective
naturithm7.caption:
When you change the way you look at things, the things you look at change.

Read that again.

Your reality isn't fixed. It shifts the moment your perspective does.

The job you hate might be the lesson you needed.
The person who hurt you might be showing you where you're still wounded.
The obstacle in your way might be the way.

Nothing changed outside. Everything changed inside.

That's the shift.

Save this. Come back when you forget.

#perspective #mindshift #waynedyer #awakening #consciousness #selfrealization #innerwork #naturithm #presencematters #mindfulness

naturithm7.name: Duck Story — Let It Go
naturithm7.caption:
Two ducks fight on a pond. Feathers fly. Water splashes.

Then it's over. Each duck flaps its wings. Shakes off the energy. And floats away. Like nothing happened.

Now imagine that duck had a human mind.

It would replay that fight for days. "I can't believe he did that. He thinks he owns this pond."

The duck knew something we forgot:

The fight is over. Flap your wings. Let it go.

Based on Eckhart Tolle — A New Earth

If you needed to hear this today, save it.

#letitgo #eckharttolle #presence #mindfulness #innercalm #overthinking #consciousness #naturithm #anewearth #mentalhealth #healing

naturithm7.name: Carl Jung — Shadow
naturithm7.caption:
What you see in others lives inside you.

The things that trigger you? They're mirrors.

The arrogance you can't stand in someone — is it because you've buried your own?
The sensitivity you judge — is it because you were told yours was too much?

Jung called it the shadow. The parts of yourself you refuse to see.

It takes one to know one. Not as an insult. As a doorway.

Next time someone triggers you, don't react. Ask: what in me is being reflected right now?

That question changes everything.

#carljung #shadowwork #selfreflection #innerwork #projection #consciousness #personalgrowth #naturithm #healingjourney #knowthyself

naturithm7.name: Dog & Fence — Invisible Limits
naturithm7.caption:
There's a dog wearing a collar. Around the yard, an invisible fence.

Every time it gets close — the collar buzzes. So the dog learns: don't go near the edge.

Over time, it forgets there's even a world beyond the yard. Its whole life shrinks to the size of what doesn't hurt.

One day, the dog walks toward the edge. The collar buzzes. It keeps walking.

The buzz gets louder. The pain gets sharper. Every part says stop.

But it takes one more step. And then — silence.

The field was always there. The collar couldn't stop it. Only the dog's belief in the collar could.

What invisible fence are you still obeying?

Inspired by Michael Singer — The Untethered Soul

#innerwork #selflimitation #fearoffailure #letgo #michaelsinger #consciousness #breakfree #naturithm #courage #healing

naturithm7.name: Meditation — I Am Not My Thoughts
naturithm7.caption:
I am not my thoughts. I am the one watching them.

This one sentence can change your entire relationship with anxiety, fear, and overthinking.

You are not the voice in your head.
You are the awareness behind it.

When a thought comes — you don't have to follow it. You can watch it. Like a cloud passing.

The mind will wander. That's its nature.
Your job isn't to stop thinking.
Your job is to notice when you're lost — and come back.

Again. And again. And again.

That's the practice. That's the freedom.

Start with 5 minutes. Eyes closed. Just breathe. Just watch.

#meditation #mindfulness #presence #innercalm #awareness #consciousness #breathe #naturithm #mentalhealth #letgo
